name: dj-library-manager
description: DJ Library Manager - organizza la tua libreria musicale (fingerprinting, doppioni, rename, rekordbox)
author: DJ Library Manager

scripts.start: node -e "delete process.env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; require('child_process').spawn(require('electron'), ['.'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE: undefined } }).on('close', c => process.exit(c))"
scripts.dev: node -e "delete process.env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; require('child_process').spawn(require('electron'), ['.'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE: undefined } }).on('close', c => process.exit(c))"
